name: agent-team
description: Cross-provider Agent Team orchestration for Kimi Code, backed by Multi-Agent Harness.

interface.shortDescription: Form, drive, and observe cross-provider agent teams from a Kimi Code session.
interface.longDescription: Gives the host Kimi Code session the Agent Team capability from Multi-Agent Harness (ADR 0025): create an AgentTeamRun, configure and launch Codex/Claude/Kimi MemberRuns, exchange ACKed messages, and watch live member state. Ships the harness MCP server (team_run_* tools), orchestration and member skills, /agent-team:* commands, and SessionStart/Stop hooks that inject active-run status plus the Browser Team Console URL.

skillInstructions: Agent Team is for work whose result should stay with a living executor while you keep a pointer; use a sub-agent when the result must come back into your own context. Never let a member deploy, delete remote resources, or make payment choices on its own — escalate to the user. Every status output must include the Team Console URL (http://127.0.0.1:8787/team-console).
